text_original: as a subscriber, I originally gave this a 5 stars, now I have to lower it to 2 stars due to most recent updates as they changed their payments plan. what most developers seem to missing is that if your bot is *"pay per message"* then the user experience will be completed alter by the economy, user will be thinking about how should you say things or how to achieve your goals more effectively to the point completely shattered the immersion. if not changed,I won't be continuing my subscriptions
text_zh: 作为一名订阅用户，我原本给的是5星好评，但由于最近的更新修改了付费方案，我不得不将其降为2星。大多数开发者似乎忽略了一点：如果你的机器人是“按消息收费”的，那么用户体验将完全被经济成本所改变。用户会一直琢磨该怎么组织语言，或者如何更高效地达到目的，以至于完全破坏了沉浸感。如果不做出改变，我将不再续订。
reply_original: The chat fees are charged because you are using more advanced models, such as the Ultra series. These models are more advanced than the older ones and have higher running costs, which is why messages are charged based on tokens.
reply_zh: 对于给您带来的困扰，我们深表歉意。您说得很对——担心消息费用完全破坏了沉浸感。我们清楚地听到了您的反馈，并正在积极评估我们的付费方案。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 并附上您的 UID，以便我们直接为您提供帮助。感谢您帮助我们改进！
reply_original_before_override: I'm truly sorry for the frustration. You make a great point—worrying about message costs completely ruins the immersion. We hear you loud and clear and are actively reviewing our payment plans. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID so we can assist you directly. Thank you for helping us improve!
override_input: 收取聊天费用是因为你使用了更高级ultra系列等等模型，这个模型比旧模型更高级，相应的成本也更高，所以按照代币收取消息费用。如果你不想用消息付费，你可以使用我们保留的旧模型集合成的免费模型，我们短期内并没有下架计划。
